summary: Verifier attempt 3 passed under the explicit override path. Spexus current_context was read before get_task for PERSONAL-TASK-1165. All dependency reports listed in the verifier prompt were present, valid JSON, and matched their expected task/epic context. Fix-2 directly closes the routed attempt-2 risk: contract-order actions now render as a compact 3x3 order grid, all nine orderContract actions remain present and labeled, and regenerated MZ-505 capture metrics show the contract action area above the status frame at both 1280x800 and 1024x768. The attempt-1 settlement/final laptop result framing fix remains intact: result panels remain above the laptop status frame and inactive hand rows are absent. Evidence is synthetic/static visual UI evidence from deterministic local Vite/Playwright fixtures, not backend-live evidence.

tests_run.evidence: Read active Spexus tenant/project/component scope before task lookup.
Confirmed task [MZ-505] US-845 visual regression for desktop table under epic PERSONAL-EP-180, refs PERSONAL-US-845 / PERSONAL-REQ-1762 / PERSONAL-AC-2428 / PERSONAL-AC-2429.

tests_run.command: JSON validation of listed dependency report paths
tests_run.evidence: Validated exact paths for MZ-501 attempt-1, MZ-502 attempt-1, MZ-503 attempt-1, MZ-504 attempt-1, MZ-505 attempt-1, fix-1, orchestrator visual rerun, attempt-2, fix-2, and task-reports/orchestrator-log.json. No listed report was missing or invalid.

Confirmed fix-2 adds a dedicated .contract-order-group/.contract-order-grid path for orderContract actions, uses compact .contract-order-button styling, preserves action keys/click handlers/accessibility labels through actionButton(), and includes focused assertions for compact labels 8♥ through 10♥.

Confirmed the capture remains a deterministic synthetic GameState fixture rendered through the local app, with only MZ505_BASE_URL configurability added for the selected Vite port. Evidence is not backend-live.

Contract desktop actionAreaRect.bottom=581.08 and max action button bottom=581.08 with statusLineTop=749.81. Contract laptop actionAreaRect.bottom=573.00 and max action button bottom=573.00 with statusLineTop=719.08. Settlement laptop resultPanelRect.bottom=679.25 and final laptop resultPanelRect.bottom=643.84, both below the 719.08 status line top.
Inspected contract desktop/laptop and settlement/final laptop screenshots. Contract-order legal actions are visible above the status frame; settlement/final result panels remain framed and readable.

fix-2.json records focused red/green tests, nearby UI regression tests, npm run verify passing, and regenerated MZ-505 screenshots/results. This verifier did not rerun npm run verify because exact current fix-2 evidence and regenerated artifacts were available and consistent.

verification_environment.evidence_limitations: Screenshots and DOM metrics are deterministic local Vite/Playwright fixture evidence. They prove frontend layout/action projection for the requested visual release gate, not backend, auth, persistence, or live integration behavior.

evidence_matrix.scenario: Verifier prompt supplied exact dependency report paths and forbade inferring attempts.
evidence_matrix.limitations: Report review validates artifact presence/structure and recorded evidence, not live execution.

evidence_matrix.scenario: Desktop/laptop table screenshots show current phase, active actor, legal human actions, contract/trump/current trick/result context, hands when applicable, and score table.
Bidding, contract, whist, play, deal-result, and final-result states show phase, active actor, legal actions, and score/contract context without incoherent overlap or blocked normal play.
evidence_matrix.limitations: Play legal actions are represented by enabled card buttons in the human hand rather than right-rail command buttons, matching the existing UI pattern.

evidence_matrix.scenario: Contract-order actions must be visible above/inside the visible table/status frame at both 1280x800 and 1024x768.
evidence_matrix.limitations: Static visual evidence; no live backend or user interaction path was exercised by this verifier.

evidence_matrix.scenario: After deal completion, result context remains understandable and the player can proceed unless the bullet is complete.
evidence_matrix.limitations: Result evidence uses deterministic fixture content.

evidence_matrix.scenario: Focused fix preserves action semantics while changing layout.
evidence_matrix.limitations: This verifier accepted exact current recorded commands from fix-2 rather than rerunning the full suite.

quality_gate_matrix.limitations: Capture metrics still report the known decorative MARRIAGE heading as clipped; this does not affect the table/action/result release gate.
Contract-order actions use short visible labels with full accessible names.
Closure evidence is visual/static UI plus recorded tests, not backend-live evidence.
